items.placeName: PATTHU SPA PHÚ QUỐC (마사지, 발 마사지, 샴푸, 按摩, 洗頭, Body Massage, Foot Massage, Shampoo, Gội Đầu Dưỡng Sinh)

facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 391 reviews. On the main strip of Trần Hưng Đạo.

PATTHU SPA PHÚ QUỐC is not hiding. It's just that most tourists walk past it chasing the beach.

Full body massage, foot massage, shampoo treatments. Staff rated consistently for pressure, timing, and not upselling you every five minutes.

391 people left reviews. Almost all of them said they came back.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: Green Paradise Spa - Massage (전신 마사지, 풋 마사지)

facebook.caption:
1,620 reviews. Every single one a 5-star. At a spa on Trần Hưng Đạo that most tourists walk straight past.

Green Paradise Spa does full-body and foot massage. No gimmicks. No upsells at the door. Just the kind of results that turn a one-time visit into a daily habit for people staying nearby.

If your legs are wrecked from beach-hopping, this is the fix. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the stress leave in real time. Green Paradise Spa on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 1,620 five-star reviews and somehow still off the tourist radar. Full-body and foot massage. Book it before your second day.

items.placeName: Ann Cafe & Brunch Phu Quoc ( Coffee Shop at Duong Dong Night Market )

facebook.caption:
4.8 stars. 545 reviews. At a café inside Chợ đêm Phú Quốc.

Ann Cafe & Brunch Phu Quoc sits right on 7 Đường Lê Thị Hồng Gấm, inside the night market chaos, and somehow pulls near-perfect ratings. That does not happen by accident.

Coffee, brunch, good vibes. While everyone else is rushing the seafood stalls, you're sitting down. Smart move.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

items.placeName: On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar

facebook.caption:
POV: you take a wrong turn down Hẻm 8 and find a restaurant literally built on the rocks above the water.

On The Rock Restaurant & Beach Bar sits inside Mango Bay, Phú Quốc. Tables over the sea. Cold drinks. 4.3 stars across 450 reviews.

This is the kind of spot you stumble into and immediately text your friends about.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
1,093 reviews. 4.2 stars. And most tourists never leave the beach to see it.

Phu Quoc National Park is a UNESCO Biosphere Reserve covering the majority of the island. Evergreen forest, rare wildlife, unique oceanic species. The kind of place that reminds you Phu Quoc is more than just resorts.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walking into Phu Quoc National Park, UNESCO Biosphere Reserve. 1,093 people rated it 4.2 stars. The forest hits different when you're actually inside it. Most visitors never make it here.

items.placeName: Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa

facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa delivers bright beachfront bungalows, open-air dining, and a spa that earns its 4.8★ across 951 reviews. No casino noise. No lobby crowds. Just sand, sea breeze, and a pace that actually lets you decompress. Two restaurants, both open-air. One spa. Zero reasons to leave the property. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.

facebook.caption:
4.7 stars. 4,860 reviews. And somehow Ong Lang beach still flies under the radar.

Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc sits right on one of the quietest stretches of coastline on the island. Two restaurants, a full spa, and a pool that actually gets sun all afternoon.

Skip the crowded south. This is where the better version of Phu Quoc lives.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Ong Lang beach at sunrise, resort completely to yourself. This is Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc, 4.7 stars across 4,860 reviews, and most tourists drive straight past it heading south. Big mistake.

4,860 reviews. 4.7 stars. Ong Lang beach almost empty.

Mövenpick Resort Waverly Phú Quốc. Save this for your trip.
